summary: Iteration 69 - Member Activation Flow Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Members page shows code_planteur for each member, Add Member modal includes PIN code field (4 digits), and success dialog shows code_planteur after member creation. The complete flow works: 1) Cooperative creates member with auto-generated code_planteur and hashed PIN, 2) ussd_registrations entry is created for USSD recognition, 3) Member can activate account using phone and password, 4) Activated user receives code_planteur from coop_members, 5) USSD callback recognizes coop-created farmers.
critical_code_review_comments: cooperative_members.py: POST /api/cooperative/members now auto-generates code_planteur using generate_farmer_code() from routes.ussd
cooperative_members.py: PIN code is hashed using SHA256 and stored as pin_hash
cooperative_members.py: ussd_registrations entry is created with same code_planteur and pin_hash for USSD recognition
auth.py: POST /api/auth/activate-member-account copies code_planteur from coop_members to the new user
auth.py: GET /api/auth/check-member-phone/{phone} returns found=true, can_activate=true for new coop members
ussd.py: find_farmer_by_phone() checks users, coop_members, AND ussd_registrations collections
MembersPage.jsx: Add member modal includes PIN code field with 4-digit validation
MembersPage.jsx: Success dialog shows code_planteur and PIN status after member creation
MembersPage.jsx: Member list displays code_planteur as green badge for each member
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing with unique phone numbers (+2250599XXXXXX format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member activation flow fully working: 1) POST /api/cooperative/members creates member with auto-generated code_planteur (GL-XXX-NNNNN format) and hashed PIN, also creates ussd_registrations entry. 2) GET /api/auth/check-member-phone/{phone} returns can_activate=true for new members. 3) POST /api/auth/activate-member-account creates user account with code_planteur copied from coop_members. 4) USSD callback recognizes coop-created farmers via ussd_registrations collection. Frontend: Members page shows code_planteur badges, Add Member modal has PIN field with validation. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.
